title: Business Development Associate
description:
About Our Client

Our client is a growing professional services firm within the advisory and consulting space, known for its high-touch client approach and strong market reputation. As part of the firm’s growth strategy for the year, they are strengthening their business development capability and are looking to hire a Business Development Associate to support and drive this next phase of expansion.

This role offers the opportunity to work closely with senior stakeholders, take real ownership of business development initiatives, and represent the firm confidently in the market.



Key Responsibilities

  • Support and drive business development initiatives across client acquisition and relationship building.
  • Own the end-to-end BD process, from prospecting and outreach to follow-ups and outcome tracking.
  • Use BD and CRM tools effectively to manage pipelines, track activity, and maintain data quality.
  • Work closely with senior stakeholders to design and execute creative outreach and engagement strategies.
  • Represent the firm professionally in external interactions, events, and client touchpoints.
  • Take accountability for driving results and continuously improving BD processes and approaches.



Requirements

  • Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in business development, client services, consulting, or a related professional services environment.
  • Candidates from recruitment backgrounds with strong client development and stakeholder management experience are welcome to apply.
  • Proven track record in supporting or driving business development outcomes.
  • Familiarity with BD tools and CRM platforms, with a structured and disciplined approach to follow-through.
  • Creative, proactive, and comfortable taking full initiative.
  • Strong communication skills and the confidence to represent the firm’s brand externally.
  • High ownership mindset, with the ability to design, execute, and drive outcomes independently.



Application Process

Please submit your resume to Eugenia Lin at eugenia.lin@empowerpartners.sg

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

EA License No.: 24S2395

Registration No.: R22107070

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2024, our Singapore-based executive search firm is on a mission to forge impactful partnerships and drive progress. We believe that matching the right talent with the right opportunity transforms both careers and organizations.


Empower Partners offer tailored solutions, including retained searches, contingency options, project consulting, interim staffing, market research, and compensation advisory.

Empower Partners excel in functional hires across banking, asset management, private wealth, payments & fintech, insurance & insurtech, family office, education, energy & renewables and professional services and consulting.


Beyond our deep understanding of Singapore, we harness our internal expertise and research capabilities to drive successful searches across Asia, Dubai, the Middle East, and the US.

You can find out more about us at https://empowerpartners.sg/


Empower Partners Search Pte Ltd is part of the CGP Group of Companies.
postedCompany.name: EMPOWER PARTNERS SEARCH PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
